title: OPAL Fuels Announces Joint Venture for North Carolina Renewable Natural Gas Production Facility
content: OPAL Fuels announced that it has entered into a joint venture with an affiliate of environmental services leader Republic Services, Inc. for a new biogas-to-renewable natural gas (â€œRNGâ€) facility at Republicâ€™s Charlotte Motor Speedway Landfill in Concord, North Carolina. The new RNG facility, owned jointly by OPAL and its minority partner, a Republic Services affiliate, will have an initial annual design capacity of approximately 1.4 million MMBtu.
author: Analysts Account
